Commands for managing CircleCI config policies.

Config policies use Open Policy Agent (OPA) Rego rules to enforce
organizational standards on pipeline configuration. Push a policy
bundle, view decision logs, and evaluate configs locally.

Usage:
  policy [command]

Available Commands:
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  decide      Evaluate a config against the active policy bundle
  diff        Preview changes before pushing a policy bundle
  eval        Evaluate a config against a local policy bundle
  fetch       Fetch the active policy bundle
  help        Help about any command
  logs        List policy decision logs
  push        Push a policy bundle to CircleCI
  settings    Get or set policy enforcement settings
  test        Run OPA tests against a policy bundle

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for policy

Use "policy [command] --help" for more information about a command.
